task_completion.description: Open the New GeoPackage Layer dialog and set the file path and table name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New GeoPackage Layer' dialog is open. The 'Database' field shows '/home/ga/GIS_Data/sensor_network.gpkg' and the 'Table name' field shows 'sensors'.

task_completion.description: Set the Geometry type to Point and the CRS to EPSG:4326.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the New GeoPackage Layer dialog, the 'Geometry type' dropdown is set to 'Point' and the CRS dropdown is set to 'EPSG:4326 - WGS 84'.

task_completion.description: Add 'model_id' and 'install_year' fields to the layer schema.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fields list at the bottom of the New GeoPackage Layer dialog shows two custom fields: 'model_id' with type Text (String) and 'install_year' with type Integer (Whole number).

task_completion.description: The 'sensors' layer is successfully created and added to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS main window is visible, and 'sensors' appears in the Layers panel on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Add a point feature in the San Francisco area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map canvas displays the San Francisco area. The 'sensors' layer is in editing mode (pencil icon), the 'Add Point Feature' tool is selected, and a new point has been clicked/placed on the map.

task_completion.description: Enter the required attribute values for the new point feature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Feature Attributes' dialog or Attribute Table is open for the new point, showing 'EnvSense-X1' in the 'model_id' field and '2024' in the 'install_year' field.
The agent clicks the 'Save Layer Edits' button (floppy disk with pencil) or toggles editing off (clicking the pencil icon) and confirms saving the changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with QGIS menus, dialogs, and map canvas, rather than a terminal window running ogr2ogr, sqlite3, or python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent navigated the map to San Francisco to place the point.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas should visibly show the geography of the San Francisco Bay Area when the point is being added.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the results in a text editor or image editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: All dialogs (New GeoPackage Layer, Feature Attributes) must be native QGIS UI elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a GeoPackage in QGIS (Layer > Create Layer > New GeoPackage Layer). File path: /home/ga/GIS_Data/sensor_network.gpkg. Table name: 'sensors'. Geometry: Point. CRS: EPSG:4326 (WGS 84). Schema requires two fields: 'model_id' (String/Text type) and 'install_year' (Integer/Whole Number type). A single point must be added in the San Francisco area with attributes model_id='EnvSense-X1' and install_year=2024. Edits must be saved to the file.
